productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Casual Grey Shoe
description: Stylish and uber cool, these casual shoes from red tape will add an extra bounce to your steps. With a great leather-suede combination in smart colors, these shoes will look perfect with your rugged jeans when you have to hang out with the cool gang. Look spectacular, classy and wow in these comfortable shoes all day long. Upper Leather upper with suede overlays for added durability and style Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Softly padded tongue and well-cushioned collar for in-step comfort and a secure fit Metal embellishments for added style Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and support Mesh inner for better breathability Ribbed rubber foxing for added support and structure Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Semi circular ridges and grooves for improved traction shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineUse a suede brush to dust suede surfaceDo not store in direct sunlight
